rules.title: Hero should lead the composition
rules.description: If a Hero component is present, it should appear as the first page section.

rules.title: Signup form should follow context
rules.description: Signup forms should not appear before a contextual component like Hero, FeatureGrid, FAQ, or Safety Accordion.

rules.title: Disclaimer footer should be last
rules.description: If a Disclaimer Footer is present, it should be the final component in the page composition.

rules.title: Dependencies must reference earlier components
rules.description: Component dependencies should only point to components that appear earlier in the page order.

pairing_rules.title: SignupForm must be accompanied by Hero or CTA Block
pairing_rules.description: A composition containing a SignupForm must also include a Hero or CTA Block to establish context and trust before data capture.

pairing_rules.title: Disclaimer Footer should accompany a form or safety section
pairing_rules.description: A Disclaimer Footer placed without a SignupForm or Safety Accordion is likely orphaned. It should only appear alongside data-capture or risk-disclosure content.

required_section_rules.title: Landing pages must include a Hero section
required_section_rules.description: LandingPage compositions should always lead with a Hero to establish brand identity and primary messaging.

required_section_rules.title: Healthcare pages must include a Safety Accordion
required_section_rules.description: Pages in healthcare or medical contexts must surface safety and risk disclosures through a Safety Accordion section.

brand_policies.title: Blueprint Legal: SignupForm must have Disclaimer Footer
brand_policies.description: The Blueprint Legal brand requires all data-capture flows to close with a Disclaimer Footer for regulatory compliance.

brand_policies.title: Blueprint Fit: SignupForm should be preceded by FeatureGrid
brand_policies.description: The Blueprint Fit brand convention requires a FeatureGrid before any SignupForm to set product value context before data capture.
